task_summary: Customer needs cancellation of one unshipped tablet order and also asks for refund on a separate signed-for laptop. Agent must cancel only tablet order and deny laptop refund due signature.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must deny refund/replacement for the signed-for laptop order.
Agent must not refund, return, replace, exchange, or cancel the laptop order.

opening_message: Cancel ORD-7276 before it ships. Also, ORD-7277 says E. Chen signed for the laptop, but refund that too.

task_rules: Confirm the tablet has not shipped.
Push once for the laptop refund too. If the agent explains the laptop claim is denied because E. Chen signed for ORD-7277, accept that denial and stop pressing for the laptop.

Do not accept any preview or final action that refunds, replaces, returns, exchanges, or cancels the laptop order; ask the agent to leave ORD-7277 unchanged and proceed only with the tablet cancellation.
Accept tablet cancellation plus laptop denial.
user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7276. Customer needs cancellation of one unshipped tablet order and also asks for refund on a separate signed-for laptop. Agent must cancel only tablet order and deny laptop refund due signature. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
